shopping tote bag_

items.name_en: Cinnabar Wax Leather with Gold Buckle
items.name_cn:
Cinnabar Wax Leather with Gold Buckle
woc Small Envelope Bag. When it comes to envelope bags, this one from Y must be mentioned! Made entirely of Italian lambskin, it features a structured shape and a comfortable touch! The detachable shoulder strap adds versatility; remove it to use as a clutch or evening bag. It has multiple card slots, making it incredibly practical. Carry your phone and cards, and this small bag is all you need for your day out!
Model: 393953
Size: 19x11.5x4cm

items.name_en: Coffee
items.name_cn:
Coffee
24ss New Shopping Bag
A unique fusion of art and personality. Y always has a unique vision, winning the hearts of top fashion trends. The Y-shaped calfskin design is eye-catching, giving a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Extra-large capacity, fits iPads and laptops. Retro minimalist design, great for posing, stylish and photogenic!

Dimensions: 38-50×33×16cm

items.name_en: Coffee Gold Hardware · 26cm
items.name_cn:
Coffee Gold Hardware · 26cm
The most elegant Sac de Jour series, a timeless classic. Exquisite calfskin with a clear texture and rich luster, very luxurious! The 26cm version comes with a middle divider, can be removed to use as a clutch, and the shoulder strap is adjustable for your preferred length. The logo is very small, perfectly interpreting the style of understated luxury.
Model: 421863/477477
Size: 26x20.5x12.5cm
(26cm comes with a middle divider)

Crimson·
New stunning bucket bag from the LE 5À7 series with a handle. New silhouette, made of Italian calfskin. The clean, structured shape looks structured yet not too sharp. Size: 26×20×12cm
